reasoning: The IIE Fall 2025 Snapshot indicates that, comparing the 2025-2026 academic year to 2024-2025, undergraduate international student enrollments are up by 2% while graduate enrollments have decreased by 12%. The Snapshot includes data from over 825 US higher education institutions and serves as a highly robust predictor for the final Open Doors release in November 2026. Given the massive 14 percentage point gap (-12% vs +2%), it is extremely likely that the final report will confirm that international enrolled graduate students experienced a greater percentage decrease than undergraduates. I am predicting 95%, with slightly lower probabilities for subsequent dates per the instruction to increase uncertainty with horizon.
